tasks.label: launch-android-emulator
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $emulatorName = 'Pixel_9'; $timeoutSeconds = 300; $pollSeconds = 2; $serial = (& adb devices | Select-String '^emulator-\d+\s+device$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } | Select-Object -First 1); if (-not $serial) { Write-Host "Starting Android emulator '$emulatorName'..."; flutter emulators --launch $emulatorName; } $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSeconds); do { $serial = (& adb devices | Select-String '^emulator-\d+\s+device$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($serial) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds $pollSeconds; } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); if (-not $serial) { throw "No Android emulator device detected within ${timeoutSeconds}s."; } do { $bootCompleted = (& adb -s $serial shell getprop sys.boot_completed).Trim(); if ($bootCompleted -eq '1') { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds $pollSeconds; } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); if ($bootCompleted -ne '1') { throw "Emulator '$serial' did not finish booting within ${timeoutSeconds}s."; } Write-Host "Android emulator '$serial' is ready.";
